parameters: Ah you're the new guy!
Whats your second biggest career regret?
Have you seen a pen lid?
I've always dreamed of owning a pen lid.
Only four days til the weekend!
Then again at this place, everydays the weekend!
I passed probation! I never have to work again!
You should go complain about the lack of desks.
I'd go too, if this chair wasn’t so comfy.
What if there were no hypothetical situations?
Where are you standing?
At least you wont get pregnant
I'd let you sit on my lap. But HR fixed the camera.
Markets awaited the spring
To see what our study would bring
But the papers delayed
Cause of school holidays
Deadlines don't mean a damn thing
Have you seen my pig?
Its amazing what you can find if you look hard enough
through your neighours bins
If you're looking for the grads, it's their nap time,
Its good working somewhere that makes a difference.
That's why I have a second job.
One pager, two pager, three pager, four
five page, six pager, seven pager more!
Apparently the CEO lost floors 12-14 in a bitcoin scam
What would you do in my position?
Oh, you'd be sitting on this lovely chair.
Hello! Would you be interested in buying
some firm permissions?
[silence]
Sorry think you're on mute
Whoah! This lift is on a whole other level!
I'm waiting here until the retirement kicks in.
These steel doors are so smooth, they remind me of home.
I love him more than timesheets
Whats the timecode for snogging in the broom cupboard?
If you wait here long enough, cake appears
Back in my day, we pretended to work on paper
How am i meant to concentrate
When theres a gorgeous pineapple pizza next to me?
Would you like this job promotion i found on the floor?
The carpet feels louder today.
We only get free porridge in January
If you land the right interveiw with the NCA, you can get
porridge for life.
Go away. I've booked this collobaration area for myself.
The names Bond
Corporate Bond
I love bond research!

haha

Let's burn that bridge when we get to it
You can’t polish a turd, but you can publish one!

known as the mensarii?
No wonder the empire fell.
You have terrible posture.
With the right attitude, you can delay anything.

It feels about 90 degrees

employees
two amazing employees leaving
